title: BBQ Gloves, 1472°F Heat Resistant Gloves Fireproof Mitts，Grilling Glove Silicone Non-Slip Washable Oven Glove, Kitchen Glove for Barbecue, Grilling, Cooking, Baking, Camping, Smoker (Black)
features: 【High Heat Resistance&Good Protection】Our BBQ gloves are comfortable, flexible, and provide the highest protection for your hands. The high quality fiber of our grilling gloves distributes heat effectively，EN407 certified withstand heats up to 1472℉. Which can ensure great protection to your hands when taking and holding hot objects involving heat.

【Premium Three Layers Material】The heat resistant gloves consist of 3 materials. The first material is silicone strips make sure your objects won't slip out in your hands. The second layer is ultra-strength aramid fiber for high heat resistance and flame retardant. The third material is polyester-cotton, which could avoid allergies and make you more comfort.

【Pretty &Non-Slip Design】Both sides of the oven gloves have different fire pattern design, more unique and pretty. You can wear the fireproof gloves by the pattern you like due to no difference between the left and right hands. And these heat resistant barbecue gloves with food-grade silicone strips ensure that your items don't slip out of your hands and providing you more protection. The five-finger design is flexible to help you hold cooking tools, grills, and other hot objects better.

【Multi-Function & Affordable】Our high temp cooking gloves are Multi-Function, which are perfect for all grilling occasions, fireplace, cooking, baking, microwave, etc. And these grilling gloves are affortable. In the pack, you will get a pair of heat-resistant cooking gloves and 50 pcs of disposable gloves as food safe gloves at restaurants or parties,which are ideal grilling accessories for men or women.

【Easy To Clean & Dry】These hot gloves for bbq are easy to Clean. After use, you just need a little soap and the light rubbing to get the oven cooking gloves clean. Feature with strip design makes it easy for you to hang them on a hook, which is easy to dry and help you to store.
description: Product Description Quality Heat-resistant BBQ Gloves Up to 1472℉ (800℃), Your Good Companion in Grilling! These grilling gloves are perfectly made for men and women. Made with non-toxic silicone, ultra-high strength aramid fiber and polyester cotton, our BBQ gloves are durable, heat-resistant,comfortable and breathable, and designed for people who are fond of BBQ. Our oven gloves are also the great gift to protect hands with your friends, family, colleagues in the high temp and enjoy the happy hours with a wonderful BBQ party! Note: Our BBQ glove heat resistant are mainly used for BBQ. Although our oven mitts are flame retardant, the protection time in open flames is very short, please keep away from fire when using to avoid burns! If it is used for baking, please pay attention to the use time to avoid burns! For your safety, use should not exceed 10-15 seconds. Enjoy Happy Hour with KUWANI BBQ Gloves Made with ultra-high strength aramid fiber for excellent thermal protection, strength, and durability. Our grilling gloves are flame-retardant and extend the time you hold hot objects. Provide the ultra protection against heat up to extreme 1472℉ ! But they are not permanent fire and thermal insulation. Temperature1472°F/800°C Time < 7-10 Sec Temperature 932°F/500°C Time < 12-15 Sec Temperature 662°F/350°C Time < 16-18 Sec Temperature 482°F/250°C Time < 21-23 Sec Our heat resistance grill gloves are breathable not waterproof, so they are not suitable for protection against hot liquids or hot gas! Long-sleeved Heat Resistance Gloves We lengthen the wrist guard lengths & palm lengths & cuff width. Ultra-long wrist guard of these Oven mitts could better protect your wrist and forearm get hurt by the stove top edge or burning coal's sparkle. And the size fits most adults. What You Get: A pair of BBQ gloves and 50pcs of food garde disposable gloves Specification Material:Silicone&Aramid Fiber& Polyester Cotton Color: Red&Black Oven Gloves size: 13.78x7.09 x 0.39 inches Wrist Guard length: 5.91 inches Cuff width: 3.93inches, maximum width :6.69 inches Disposable gloves size: 9 *10 inches Anti-slip BBQ Gloves The heat resistant bbq gloves are covered with silicone grips to make sure your objects won't slip out in your hands. Breathable & Comfortable Knitting Cotton Layer The inner layer of oven mitts is polyester-cotton, which could avoid allergies and provide double protection. The knitting design enhances the comfort and breathability of the flame resistant gloves,never worry about stickiness caused by sweating. Inner lanyard design Feature with lanyard design makes it easy for you to hang them on a hook when not in use, which is easy to dry and help you to store. The perfect accessory for grilling or cooking at home Wearing grilling gloves, you could pending your BBQ masterpiece and be handing hot meats with ease, pull pork like the pros! Not only that, these oven mitts also the perfect companion for baking and cooking, so you don't have to worry about getting burnt while stir-frying, cooking, or serving hot dishes.
